checkInterval.tooltip: How often to check for updates in the background.

showDesktopNotifications.tooltip: Show a desktop alert when new updates are found.

terminalEmulator.tooltip: Terminal emulator to open when executing the package update.

updateCommand.tooltip: The command executed inside the terminal to apply package upgrades.

checkAur.tooltip: Include updates from the Arch User Repository (AUR).

aurHelper.tooltip: The command line helper used to query AUR updates.
